chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Constitutional Petition No. D-4016 of 2025 Date Order with signature of Judge(s) 1. For order on Misc. No.16685/2025 (Urgency) 2. For order on office objection Nos.1 to 5 3. For order on Misc. No.16686/2025 (Exemption) 4. For order on Misc. No.16687/2025 (Stay) 5. For hearing of main case 22.8.2025 Mr. Mubarak Ali Shah advocate alongwith Mr. Masood advocate for the petitioner -------------------------------- 1. Urgent application is allowed 2-5. The main grievance of learned counsel for the petitioner is that an illegal construction is being made on the subject plot i.e. 4-B, Block-13, Muhammad Ali Memorial Cooperative Society, Karachi in violation of the approved building plan. If so advised, the petitioner shall file his complaint through the Smart Complaint Redressal Mechanism (SCRM) before the Sindh Building Control Authority (SBCA), which the SBCA shall attend to according to its SOPs. A copy of this order shall be sent to the Director General, SBCA, for compliance. Petition stands disposed of in the above terms alongwith listed applications. HEAD OF CONST. BENCHES JUDGE Zahid/*
